subcodes.first_line: O thou who art remembered in the Most Great Scene! Every mention among all mentions and every thing among all things lieth within the grasp of annihilation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا منظر در منظر اکبر مذکوری هر ذکری از اذکار و هر شیئی از اشیاء را ید فنا
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God sanctified from time and place, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
